Amid the Paris Olympics, Shanghai is embracing the Olympic spirit through a mini-Olympics event and virtual sports competitions. In RuihongTiandi district, the city is offering a diverse range of sports activities. Meanwhile, the Shanghai Virtual Sports Open features elite rowing contests. This fusion of amateur and professional events underscores Shanghai's dedication to promoting athleticism and innovation in sports, echoing the global excitement surrounding the Olympics.
